title: bidens micrantha
intro: Bidens micrantha, also known as small bur marigold, is a flowering plant species native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bidens micrantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Bidens micrantha can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to treat skin conditions and wounds.
